channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Hailey Van Lith scores 26 points to lead TCU to 1st Elite Eight with 71-62 win over Notre Dame
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — TCU is in unchartered territory thanks to Hailey Van Lith, reaching the Elite Eight for the first time. It sure seems like business as usual for the dynamic guard. Van Lith scored 12 of her 26 points in the fourth quarter to help second-seeded TCU beat No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Luge officials predict 2026 Olympic sliding races will be in Italy, a good sign for Milan-Cortina
item.description: Next year's Olympic sliding races will be in Italy after all, international luge officials predicted Saturday in another ringing endorsement of the newly rebuilt track in Cortina d'Ampezzo.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Scherzer allows 2 HRs, leaves Blue Jays debut after 3 innings because of right lat soreness
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Three-time Cy Young Award winner Max Scherzer left his debut start with the Toronto Blue Jays on Saturday because of soreness in his right lat muscle. Facing Baltimore, Scherzer allowed two runs and three hits, including two solo home runs.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Judge homers 3 times as Yanks go deep on Cortes' first 3 pitches and hit 9 HRs vs. Brewers
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Aaron Judge combined with Paul Goldschmidt and Cody Bellinger to go deep on the first three pitches from Nestor Cortes, then hit two more homers as the New York Yankees set a team record with nine home runs against the Milwaukee Brewers on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Leigh Steinberg says 'Jerry Maguire' humanized sports agents as public perception was 'not the best' in '90s
item.description: Leigh Steinberg, professional sports agent for Patrick Mahomes, told Fox News Digital that Cuba Gooding Jr. had to pretend to be a wide receiver during Super Bowl week while filming.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Golden Knights overcome Donato's hat trick to beat Blackhawks 5-3 for 5th straight win
item.description: Pavel Dorofeyev scored a power-play goal with 3:10 left to snap a tie, and the Vegas Golden Knights rallied for their fifth straight win, 5-3 over the Chicago Blackhawks on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Alysa Liu delivers the US its first women's figure skating world championship in nearly 2 decades
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Alysa Liu skated around the ice in disbelief, her golden dress shimmering in the lights of TD Garden, and the appreciative roar from a sellout crowd reminded her why she had returned to the sport following a nearly two-year retirement.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fans chant 'sell the team' at Rays home opener; team owner says talks are nothing new
item.description: The Rays pulled out a win in their new home for the season at Steinbrenner Field, but the ball club's future in Tampa Bay remains uncertain.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lilia Vu has another bogey-free day and leads a pack of LPGA stars in Arizona
item.description: CHANDLER, Ariz. (AP) — Lilia Vu didn't feel her best on the range. She made up for that on the golf course Friday with an 8-under 64, giving her a two-shot lead over a group that includes Nelly Korda and Jeeno Thitikul in a Ford Championship packed with LPGA stars. Korda and Thitikul, the Nos.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Deion Sanders walks back comments on son Shedeur Sanders' landing spot in NFL Draft
item.description: Deion Sanders said he won't wield his influence over Shedeur Sanders as the NFL Draft draws near. Coach Prime previously indicated he preferred his son land with certain franchises.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump admin refers Maine's 'noncompliance with Title IX' to DOJ amid fight over trans athletes
item.description: The Trump administration on Friday announced it has referred Maine's "noncompliance with Title IX" to the Department of Justice for enforcement.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DePaul women's basketball coach Doug Bruno steps down after 39 seasons
item.description: CHICAGO — Chicago has produced a lot of basketball icons and one of them in Lincoln Park is stepping down — DePaul's longtime women's basketball coach Doug Bruno.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Yankees' Carlos Rodon's beard draws mixed reviews from fans on social media after facial hair policy change
item.description: New York Yankees starting pitcher Carlos Rodon's beard during the team's opener against the Milwaukee Brewers drew mixed reviews from fans on social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Green Bay Packer charged for alleged dogfighting
item.description: The standout college football running back played 14 games for the Green and Gold between 1994 and 1995.
item.dc:creator: Nick Witwer, NewsNation

item.title: New San Diego Padres mural in North Park nears completion
item.description: A new San Diego Padres-themed mural in North Park replacing a previous work of public art that had been defaced earlier this year by fans of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers is nearing completion, just in time for opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Rays prepare for Tampa home opener
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Tampa Bay Rays have their home opener for their season at Steinbrenner Field on Friday. The game is already a sell out. Seating capacity at this years games will be greatly reduced, due to major hurricane damage at Tropicana Field.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Diego State Aztec guard declares for NBA Draft
item.description: San Diego State Aztecs men's basketball player Miles Byrd is looking to make his next move to the professional level.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: How the San Diego Padres got their name
item.description: The San Diego Padres' name is a tribute to the city's history, with the team's name coming from the Franciscan Friars who founded the area.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Late boxing legend George Foreman had deep ties to this East Bay city
item.description: (KRON) -- Boxing legend and former heavyweight champion George Foreman died last Friday at the age of 76. Foreman was born in Texas. However, after a troubled upbringing, he then moved to the West Coast after ninth grade when he enrolled in President Lyndon B. Johnson's Job Corps work program.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Power conferences box out 'Cinderella' for the first time
item.description: The Sweet 16, a popular destination for bracket-busting mid-majors, will be made up entirely of teams from power conferences, a first since the bracket expanded to 64 teams in 1985.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tiger Woods confirms relationship with Vanessa Trump
item.description: “Love is in the air and life is better with you by my side! We look forward to our journey through life together,” Woods said on X, where he has 6.4 million followers.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alabama rolls by Saint Mary's 80-66 to reach the NCAA Tournament's Sweet 16 for a 3rd straight year
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Alabama turned the page on the program's first Final Four appearance the moment the players received their commemorative rings in October. Coach Nate Oats knew his team needed to get a little deeper and more athletic, and find more balance to go even further this season.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Tiger Woods confirms his relationship with Vanessa Trump in a social media post
item.description: Tiger Woods has confirmed his relationship with the former daughter-in-law of President Donald Trump, publishing two images to social media in a post that said, “Love is in the air.” Woods and Vanessa Trump, who was married to Donald Trump Jr.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego Wave FC triumphs 3-2 over Utah Royals in home opener
item.description: San Diego Wave FC secured a thrilling 3-2 victory over the Utah Royals in their highly anticipated home opener match at Snapdragon Stadium on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: BYU headed to Sweet 16 after 91-89 win over Wisconsin
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time in 14 years, the BYU basketball team is headed to the Sweet 16. Richie Saunders scored 25 points, while Trevin Knell added 14, as the Cougars held off a ferocious late run by Wisconsin to hold on for a 91-89 victory at Ball Arena in Denver.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LeBron James' return from injury spoiled by Bulls' phenomenal effort in 146-115 win over Lakers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James' return from a seven-game absence was the dominant storyline, to say the least, when the Bulls got ready to face the Lakers in Los Angeles on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Sweet 16: Calipari guides Arkansas past Pitino, St. John's 75-66 for 16th trip to regional semifinal
item.description: John Calipari is heading to the Sweet 16 for the 16th time, and this one could be the sweetest of all.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, Fox 5
